testcase.name: test_login_user
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration10_features.py:59: in test_login_user self.test_register_user(test_user) backend/tests/test_iteration10_features.py:40: in test_register_user assert response.status_code == 200, f"Registration failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Registration failed: {"detail":"El email ya está registrado"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_market_study_different_routes
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration10_features.py:409: in test_market_study_different_routes assert response.status_code == 200, f"Market study failed for {route['origin']}->{route['destination']}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Market study failed for MX->US: {"detail":"Error al generar el estudio de mercado: 500: Error al procesar la respuesta de IA. Por favor intenta de nuevo."} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
